cit.basis: Corporation Tax Act: 30% standard; 35% for commercial banks and petrochemical companies; 50% for petroleum production companies under the Petroleum Profits Tax (PPT) regime.
cit.note: Administered by the Inland Revenue Division (IRD).

business_levy.note: Business levy of 0.6% of gross revenue, creditable against corporation tax (payable when it exceeds the corporation tax liability). Not computed by this profit-based SME estimator.

green_fund_levy.note: Green fund levy of 0.3% of gross revenue; not creditable against corporation tax. Not computed by this profit-based SME estimator.

vat.note: VAT standard rate 12.5%; zero-rated and exempt supplies exist.

official_sources.name: Inland Revenue Division (IRD), Trinidad and Tobago

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Business levy and green fund levy on gross revenue, supplemental petroleum tax, unemployment levy, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official IRD guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
